title: ViMo
description: This mod adds classes, magic, weapons inspire by Castle Crashers
body:
## `Information`

This is a mod that will add character classes from Castle Crashers new weapons and other fun items to the game.

## ```Classes```

**4 classes to choose from:**
- Poison Knight
- Fire Knight
- Ice Knight
- Electric Knight

## `Magic`

**3 unique abilities for each class**

## `Weapons`

**Different weapons for each class**

![ElectroMace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VK2H4CLA/images/f80a18607f44f7a9b8bfbc004db5fea89b5816fd_350.webp)
![FightAxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VK2H4CLA/images/bb5844e2bab16f624500f04eb3618ff89b168b28_350.webp)

## `Mobs`

### Demon
![Demon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VK2H4CLA/images/a3bd038bcece4ce4ff9ed2a6f12759a8840b3264_350.webp)
![Demon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VK2H4CLA/images/74cffc10977d1bc4c0f5090cf032899ebb78046f_350.webp)

A 1 block sized mob that appears when a nether portal is created.

## `Funny Items`

### Sandwich
**When eaten, you gain the gigantism effect of level 5 strength and start screaming. Can be purchased from a Wanderer Merchant**
